title: What's Your Dream? | #shorts
full_text: Okay, Mom. I've officially done one and a half weeks of college. Yes. And I've decided just like some role models like Mr. Beast that I think that's enough for me and I'm going to drop out and start my own YouTube channel. >> What? Mr. Beast is your role model when you're my son. >> But Mr. Look how big Mr. Beast is. He dropped out after one week and started a YouTube channel. >> He did that. That's why his name is Beast. Do you think his name is Mr. Princeton, Mr. Harvard? No, it is Beast. Everybody is scared of him. Like, woo, don't go near him. >> So, do you not support my dreams of becoming a YouTuber? Who told you that's a dream? That is a nightmare. >> What happened to supporting your kids' dreams? >> Yes, a dream is I want to be a doctor.
